title: HR Manager
description: Looking for an HR Manager with expertise in staffing and recruiting, performance management, employee relations, employment law, and coaching. Candidate should have experience in onboarding, developing HR policies, handling employee issues, and guiding managers on performance assessment and disciplinary actions.

title: HR Generalist
description: Seeking an HR Generalist familiar with recruitment, employee onboarding, benefits administration, performance management, and labor relations. Candidate must be able to assist management, support HR compliance, and maintain HR records.
